chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI Criminal Misc. Application No.864 of 2025 DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATUREs OF JUDGEs 1. For orders on office objection 2. For hearing of main case ------------------------- 19.02.2026 None present for applicant Mr. Tahir Hussain Mangi, A.P.G. Mr. Abdul Samee, advocate for respondents ------------------------------------ Applicant and his counsel are called absent. Applicant, who is complainant of FIR No.37/2025, registered at Police Station Thatta for offence under section 320, 34, PPC, has impugned the order dated 19.03.2025, whereby learned Sessions Judge, Thatta admitted respondents 2 to 5 on pre- arrest bail. Applicant has moved application for cancellation of bail. I have gone through the impugned order, which has been passed in accordance with law and apparently there is no illegality or irregularity committed in it. No case for interference is made out. Instant criminal miscellaneous application is dismissed. However, learned trial Court is directed to conclude the trial preferably within three months. J U D G E Gulsher/PS
